name: openinference-semantic-conventions

metadata.name: openinference-semantic-conventions
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# OpenInference Semantic Conventions

[![pypi](https://badge.fury.io/py/openinference-semantic-conventions.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/openinference-semantic-conventions/)

This library contains code for the OpenInference Semantic Conventions defined by the OpenInference specification.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.OUTPUT_MIME_TYPE
documentation:
The type of output.value. If unspecified, the type is plain text by default.
If type is JSON, the value is a string representing a JSON object.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.INPUT_MIME_TYPE
documentation:
The type of input.value. If unspecified, the type is plain text by default.
If type is JSON, the value is a string representing a JSON object.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EMBEDDING_EMBEDDINGS
documentation: A list of objects containing embedding data, including the vector and represented piece of text.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.EMBEDDING_MODEL_NAME
documentation: The name of the embedding model.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_FUNCTION_CALL
documentation:
For models and APIs that support function calling. Records attributes such as the function
name and arguments to the called function.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_INVOCATION_PARAMETERS
documentation: Invocation parameters passed to the LLM or API, such as the model name, temperature, etc.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_INPUT_MESSAGES
documentation: Messages provided to a chat API.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_OUTPUT_MESSAGES
documentation: Messages received from a chat API.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_MODEL_NAME
documentation: The name of the model being used.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_PROVIDER
documentation: The provider of the model, such as OpenAI, Azure, Google, etc.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_SYSTEM
documentation: The AI product as identified by the client or server

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_PROMPTS
documentation: Prompts provided to a completions API.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_PROMPT_TEMPLATE
documentation: The prompt template as a Python f-string.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_PROMPT_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES
documentation: A list of input variables to the prompt template.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_PROMPT_TEMPLATE_VERSION
documentation: The version of the prompt template being used.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_TOKEN_COUNT_PROMPT
documentation: Number of tokens in the prompt.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_TOKEN_COUNT_COMPLETION
documentation: Number of tokens in the completion.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_TOKEN_COUNT_TOTAL
documentation: Total number of tokens, including both prompt and completion.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.LLM_TOOLS
documentation: List of tools that are advertised to the LLM to be able to call

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.TOOL_NAME
documentation: Name of the tool being used.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.TOOL_DESCRIPTION
documentation: Description of the tool's purpose, typically used to select the tool.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.TOOL_PARAMETERS
documentation:
Parameters of the tool represented a dictionary JSON string, e.g.
see https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/gpt/function-calling

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.METADATA
documentation:
Metadata attributes are used to store user-defined key-value pairs.
For example, LangChain uses metadata to store user-defined attributes for a chain.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.TAG_TAGS
documentation: Custom categorical tags for the span.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.SESSION_ID
documentation: The id of the session

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.SpanAttributes.USER_ID
documentation: The id of the user

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_ROLE
documentation: The role of the message, such as "user", "agent", "function".

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_CONTENT
documentation: The content of the message to or from the llm, must be a string.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_CONTENTS
documentation:
The message contents to the llm, it is an array of
`message_content` prefixed attributes.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_NAME
documentation:
The name of the message, often used to identify the function
that was used to generate the message.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_TOOL_CALLS
documentation: The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_FUNCTION_CALL_NAME
documentation:
The function name that is a part of the message list.
This is populated for role 'function' or 'agent' as a mechanism to identify
the function that was called during the execution of a tool.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_FUNCTION_CALL_ARGUMENTS_JSON
documentation:
The JSON string representing the arguments passed to the function
during a function call.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageAttributes.MESSAGE_TOOL_CALL_ID
documentation: The id of the tool call.
Attributes for a message sent to or from an LLM

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageContentAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageContentAttributes.MESSAGE_CONTENT_TYPE
documentation: The type of the content, such as "text" or "image".

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageContentAttributes.MESSAGE_CONTENT_TEXT
documentation: The text content of the message, if the type is "text".

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.MessageContentAttributes.MESSAGE_CONTENT_IMAGE
documentation:
The image content of the message, if the type is "image".
An image can be made available to the model by passing a link to
the image or by passing the base64 encoded image directly in the
request.
Attributes for the contents of user messages sent to an LLM.

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ImageAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ImageAttributes.IMAGE_URL
documentation: An http or base64 image url
Attributes for images

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.DocumentAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.DocumentAttributes.DOCUMENT_ID
documentation: The id of the document.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.DocumentAttributes.DOCUMENT_SCORE
documentation: The score of the document

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.DocumentAttributes.DOCUMENT_CONTENT
documentation: The content of the document.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.DocumentAttributes.DOCUMENT_METADATA
documentation:
The metadata of the document represented as a dictionary
JSON string, e.g. `"{ 'title': 'foo' }"`
Attributes for a document.

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.RerankerAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.RerankerAttributes.RERANKER_INPUT_DOCUMENTS
documentation: List of documents as input to the reranker

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.RerankerAttributes.RERANKER_OUTPUT_DOCUMENTS
documentation: List of documents as output from the reranker

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.RerankerAttributes.RERANKER_QUERY
documentation: Query string for the reranker

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.RerankerAttributes.RERANKER_MODEL_NAME
documentation: Model name of the reranker

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.RerankerAttributes.RERANKER_TOP_K
documentation: Top K parameter of the reranker
Attributes for a reranker

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.EmbeddingAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.EmbeddingAttributes.EMBEDDING_TEXT
documentation: The text represented by the embedding.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.EmbeddingAttributes.EMBEDDING_VECTOR
documentation: The embedding vector.
Attributes for an embedding

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ToolCallAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ToolCallAttributes.TOOL_CALL_ID
documentation: The id of the tool call.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ToolCallAttributes.TOOL_CALL_FUNCTION_NAME
documentation: The name of function that is being called during a tool call.

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ToolCallAttributes.TOOL_CALL_FUNCTION_ARGUMENTS_JSON
documentation:
The JSON string representing the arguments passed to the function
during a tool call.
Attributes for a tool call

classes.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ToolAttributes

class_variables.name: openinference.semconv.trace.ToolAttributes.TOOL_JSON_SCHEMA
documentation:
The json schema of a tool input, It is RECOMMENDED that this be in the
OpenAI tool calling format: https://platform.openai.com/docs/assistants/tools
Attributes for a tools
